title: Western Australia: the search for oil
creator_credit: Norman A. Uren and Western Australian Government Film Unit
brief_description: Shows the first operational stage of the search for oil at Exmouth Gulf (WA) including the seismograph party making exploratory drillings and echo soundings with explosives. (Explains the principle of this method with diagrams.) A highlight is the building of the large derrick before drilling for oil began.
